first_contentful_paint: var e = performance.getEntriesByName('first-contentful-paint'); if (e && e.length > 0) { return e[0].startTime; } return -1;
total_blocking_time: var tot = 0; var entries = performance.getEntriesByType('longtask'); if (entries && entries.length > 0) { entries.forEach(function(t){ tot += t.duration; }); return tot; } var res = performance.getEntriesByType('resource'); if (res && res.length > 0) { res.forEach(function(r){ if (r.duration > 50) tot += r.duration; }); } return tot;
